summary: Completed comprehensive testing of M2 Estimates/BOQ feature (Offers with BOQ lines, versioning, Activity Catalog). Backend 100% pass rate (25/25 tests). Frontend fully functional with all pages working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/offers - Creates offer with lines, computes totals correctly
GET /api/offers - Lists offers with filters (projectId, status)
GET /api/offers/{id} - Returns single offer with project info
PUT /api/offers/{id} - Updates draft offer metadata
PUT /api/offers/{id}/lines - Updates BOQ lines and recomputes totals
POST /api/offers/{id}/send - Changes status to Sent
POST /api/offers/{id}/accept - Changes status to Accepted (Admin/Owner only)
POST /api/offers/{id}/reject - Changes status to Rejected (Admin/Owner only)
POST /api/offers/{id}/new-version - Clones offer with incremented version
DELETE /api/offers/{id} - Deletes draft/sent/rejected offers (not accepted)
Accepted offer cannot be edited (locked) - verified both API and UI
Totals computation: subtotal = sum(qty * (material + labor)), vat = subtotal * vatPercent/100, total = subtotal + vat
Versioning: new version has parent_offer_id, same offer_no, incremented version, new line IDs
Activity Catalog CRUD: POST, GET, PUT, DELETE /api/activity-catalog
Frontend: Offers list page with filters (search, project, status) and table
Frontend: Offer editor with BOQ lines table and live totals
Frontend: Activity catalog page with CRUD
Frontend: Navigation - Offers and Activities links in sidebar
Frontend: Accepted offers show 'New Version' button instead of Save/Send
Frontend: Accepted offers have all inputs disabled (locked)
Frontend: Status badges (Draft=gray, Sent=blue, Accepted=green, Rejected=red)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed offers and activities, cleanup at end. Existing offers: OFF-0001 (v1 Accepted, v2 Draft), OFF-0003 (Accepted). One activity ELEC-001 exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: M2 Estimates/BOQ feature fully implemented and tested. Key flows: Create offer with BOQ lines -> Send -> Accept/Reject. Versioning creates new draft from sent/accepted/rejected. Accepted offers are locked. Activity catalog allows reusable activities per project. WorkReport form has optional activity picker when activities exist for the project.

test_classes: TestOfferCRUD - Basic CRUD operations and totals computation
TestOfferVersioning - Version creation and parent linking
TestOfferReject - Rejection flow and versioning from rejected
TestOfferEdgeCases - Validation rules (empty offer, draft accept, etc.)

pages_tested: OfferEditorPage - Create, edit, BOQ lines, totals, actions
ActivityCatalogPage - List, create dialog, edit, delete
